products.name: Kona (KA1 Series)
products.descriptor: 8.50mm pitch high-reliability power connector family, up to 60A per contact

evidence.snippet:
8.50mm Pitch High-Reliability Connector - Kona
*   Individual straight female solder contact, suitable for 8 AWG cable, up to 60A per contact nominal.

products.name: Datamate J-Tek
products.descriptor: 2mm pitch high-reliability signal connector with jackscrew retention

evidence.snippet:
2.00mm Pitch High-Reliability Connector - Datamate J-Tek
*   Double Row, 3mm PC Tail connector with Hexagonal slotted jackscrews - 20 contacts (10+10).
*   Gold finish on contact area, Tin finish on termination.

products.name: Datamate Mix-Tek
products.descriptor: High-reliability connector range supporting mixed power and signal contacts

evidence.snippet: *   Use with male crimp connectors in the Datamate J-Tek and Mix-Tek ranges.

products.name: Datamate Power
products.descriptor: 4mm pitch high-reliability power connector, up to 40A per contact

evidence.snippet:
4.00mm Pitch High-Reliability Connector - Datamate Power
*   Complete kit: housing (with hexagonal slotted jackscrews) with 2 x power contacts supplied loose.
*   [Power solder contact](/products/M80-325) suitable for 12 AWG. Gold finish on contact area and termination.

products.name: Datamate L-Tek
products.descriptor: 2mm pitch high-reliability connector with latch-retention mating system

evidence.snippet:

    [](https://content.harwin.com/asset/1ff89923-2a67-436f-be92-10fc16659d62/CPLJ-Product-Training-Module-Guide-to-Datamate-Latches-L-Tek-Jackscrews-J-Tek-and-101Lok.pdf)

products.name: KA1-0400005
products.descriptor: Kona female 8 AWG straight solder power contact, 60A, gold finish

evidence.snippet:
Female 8 AWG Straight Solder Power Contact, loose
=================================================
8.50mm Pitch High-Reliability Connector - Kona
*   Individual straight female solder contact, suitable for 8 AWG cable, up to 60A per contact nominal.

products.name: KA1-1150005
products.descriptor: Kona male horizontal throughboard PCB power contact, 60A, gold finish

evidence.snippet:
Male Horizontal Throughboard Power Contact
==========================================
8.50mm Pitch High-Reliability Connector - Kona
*   Single contact, throughboard, Horizontal orientation with 6.5mm termination.
*   Used as the male contact in [KA1-MH1](/products?q=KA1-MH1) horizontal throughboard connectors.
*   Gold finish on contact area and termination.

products.name: KA1-9700200
products.descriptor: Kona 2-position straight cable aluminium metal backshell with nickel plating

evidence.snippet:
2 Pos. Straight Cable Metal Backshell for Kona
==============================================
8.50mm Pitch High-Reliability Connector - Kona
*   Aluminium alloy Metal Backshell kit with nickel plating, for straight cable connectors - includes 2 metal hood halves and short screws & nuts for joining the halves.

products.name: KA1-9600202
products.descriptor: Kona 2-position right-angle PCB mount male plug metal backshell, nickel-plated aluminium

evidence.snippet:
2 Pos. Male Plug Right-Angle Board Mount Metal Backshell for Kona
=================================================================
8.50mm Pitch High-Reliability Connector - Kona
*   Aluminium alloy Metal Backshell with nickel plating, for right-angle PCB-mounted connectors. Accessory only - connectors to be purchased separately.
*   Use with the following 2-contact male plug PCB connector [KA1-MH10205M3](/products/KA1-MH10205M3).

products.name: M80-4002042
products.descriptor: Datamate J-Tek 20-contact dual-row female vertical PCB connector with jackscrews

evidence.snippet:
10+10 Pos. Female DIL Vertical Throughboard Conn. Jackscrews
============================================================
2.00mm Pitch High-Reliability Connector - Datamate J-Tek
*   Double Row, 3mm PC Tail connector with Hexagonal slotted jackscrews - 20 contacts (10+10).
*   Gold finish on contact area, Tin finish on termination.
*   For complete pin numbering or pin out information, see the [Component Specification C005XX](https://content.harwin.com/m/af82fc432c606a31/original/C005-C005XX-Component-Specification-Datamate-M80-and-M83-Series-2-00mm-4-00mm-pitch-High-Reliability.pdf).

products.name: M300
products.descriptor: High-reliability connector range for demanding applications

evidence.snippet: *   Distributor part numbers for suitable cables for Datamate + Gecko + M300 & Kona

unresolved_questions: Gecko: Only named in a document download link title ('Distributor part numbers for suitable cables for Datamate + Gecko + M300 & Kona'). No product description, pitch, contact count, or use-case details available in corpus. The dedicated page (https://www.harwin.com/hri-range/gecko) was skipped.
M300: Same situation as Gecko – named only in a document link title alongside Gecko and Kona. No product description in corpus. Dedicated page (https://www.harwin.com/hri-range/m300) was skipped.

EZi Range: Identified only from the site navigation footer as a top-level product range. Sub-pages (ezi-range/pogo-pins, ezi-range/shield-cans, ezi-range/shielding, etc.) suggest it is primarily an EMC shielding and PCB hardware range, but no page content was fetched. Descriptor is therefore a placeholder.

Datamate L-Tek: Identified only via test report and training module document titles in other products' download sections. No standalone product page in corpus; product characteristics (latch mechanism, available SKUs) unknown.
Datamate Mix-Tek: Identified via a product datasheet title and a cross-reference in M80-1950005 contact page. No dedicated product listing page fetched; full SKU range unknown.

fetch_requests.reason: Primary product page for Gecko connector family – needed to confirm product descriptor, pitch, contact type, and readiness. Currently only named in a document link title.
Primary product page for M300 connector family – needed to confirm product descriptor, pitch, contact type, and readiness. Currently only named in a document link title.
Top-level EZi Range page – needed to confirm what products are in this range (appears to be EMC shielding/PCB hardware based on sub-URLs) and to write an accurate descriptor.
Datamate product family page – would confirm Datamate J-Tek, L-Tek, Mix-Tek, and Power sub-families and their descriptions in one place.
HRi cable assemblies product page – would confirm product scope and available configurations beyond the homepage teaser.
